How could anyone not know you?” 1127 01:13:00,218 --> 01:13:02,843 He said, “For your information, we’re friends and relatives” 1128 01:13:03,545 --> 01:13:05,374 “We’ve been in touch with you many times” 1129 01:13:06,288 --> 01:13:12,194 At that moment, the patient’s wife was holding my hand because I had no strength left to stand, so I squeezed her hand 1130 01:13:12,304 --> 01:13:14,648 She said, “Excuse me, Sheikh” 1131 01:13:15,690 --> 01:13:20,025 “This man came with us and saved my husband. He’s our neighbor.” Then she took me outside 1132 01:13:22,148 --> 01:13:24,093 What can I say? 1133 01:13:24,118 --> 01:13:29,601 That man knew everything about me, how much I earned each day, and how many millions I made 1134 01:13:30,187 --> 01:13:35,304 Sometimes I would call in front of him and order 200 or 300 boxes of cigarettes a day 1135 01:13:35,937 --> 01:13:39,874 I asked her, “Did I wrong you in any way? Did I ever harm you?” 1136 01:13:40,523 --> 01:13:45,552 “You came into my house, and I came into yours. You know there’s no need to remind you of that” 1137 01:13:45,577 --> 01:13:47,655 She said, “God willing, no one will harm you” 1138 01:13:48,894 --> 01:13:51,484 Anyway, I just told her, “Please help me escape from the hospital” 1139 01:13:52,265 --> 01:13:55,393 At that time, I was driving a Mercedes 600 “Shabah” 1140 01:13:56,691 --> 01:13:59,218 When I left the Modern Medicine Hospital 1141 01:14:01,530 --> 01:14:05,198 I ran down a slope in front of the hospital 1142 01:14:05,995 --> 01:14:09,939 As I reached the bottom, a car suddenly appeared in front of me, and I almost crashed into it 1143 01:14:09,964 --> 01:14:13,215 My own car was parked in front of the hospital. I had used it to drive the patient there 1144 01:14:13,597 --> 01:14:18,237 I jumped into a Saba taxi and escaped 1145 01:14:18,534 --> 01:14:22,948 When I got home, my kids asked, “Where’s your car?” 1146 01:14:23,290 --> 01:14:28,790 That’s when I realized, from fear and panic, that I’d left my car in front of the Modern Medicine Hospital 1147 01:14:29,287 --> 01:14:30,831 Imagine that situation 1148 01:14:32,612 --> 01:14:37,933 I told my wife, “Gather all the money we have. We’re leaving” 1149 01:14:38,938 --> 01:14:43,883 My wife started collecting the money and cash. I didn’t sleep until 3 a.m. 1150 01:14:44,399 --> 01:14:46,618 I locked the doors and sat on the stairs 1151 01:14:46,829 --> 01:14:49,974 We had a big chandelier above the stairs, surrounded by a railing 1152 01:14:49,999 --> 01:14:53,100 I sat there, and somehow, I dozed off 1153 01:14:53,454 --> 01:14:55,288 Then the man knocked on the door 1154 01:14:56,321 --> 01:14:58,797 He still had the IV drip attached, and his wife brought him to me 1155 01:14:59,126 --> 01:15:02,985 I looked down from above and saw him. I said, “Who’s at the door?” He answered, “It’s Abu [name withheld]” 1156 01:15:04,914 --> 01:15:08,618 I told my wife, “Open the door for him.” My family was awake. We were about to flee 1157 01:15:10,203 --> 01:15:12,524 She opened the door, and he came in and sat down 1158 01:15:14,063 --> 01:15:15,626 I said, “What do you want from me, brother?” 1159 01:15:17,657 --> 01:15:25,579 I meant, ask for anything you want, and I’ll give it to you. Just let me and my children get out of here alive 1160 01:15:27,273 --> 01:15:29,587 The man—may God bless him—had mercy on me 1161 01:15:30,428 --> 01:15:34,378 He said, “You’re a good man. You have faith in God, and you’re a decent person” 1162 01:15:34,403 --> 01:15:36,849 “If I stay here, they’ll harm me” 1163 01:15:37,248 --> 01:15:39,906 He was from the al-Akkal family of the Naeimi clan 1164 01:15:40,716 --> 01:15:46,169 He had infiltrated me and discovered who I was. He was from the village of al-Akkal but not one of their own 1165 01:15:47,771 --> 01:15:51,568 They brought him in pretending he was poor. Those who sent him were senior leaders in the organization 1166 01:15:51,593 --> 01:15:56,772 He told me, “When they brought me in, it was to bring them your head and slaughter you. But you welcomed me into your home” 1167 01:16:00,560 --> 01:16:05,192 In the last moment, he changed his mind and said, “Forgive me, brother. Please forgive me” 1168 01:16:05,646 --> 01:16:07,856 I asked, “Do you want money?” He said, “I don’t need money” 1169 01:16:08,826 --> 01:16:10,349 “It was all a setup against you” 1170 01:16:11,342 --> 01:16:12,818 And that’s the story 1171 01:16:13,099 --> 01:16:16,107 I stood up, kissed his head, and said, “May God guide you” 1172 01:16:16,685 --> 01:16:19,099 He said, “I’m sick, and I have disabled children” 1173 01:16:19,568 --> 01:16:23,937 Previously, I had paid for a rifle he owed the al-Akkal sons 1174 01:16:23,962 --> 01:16:26,980 Every day they’d bring him and humiliate him over that rifle’s price 1175 01:16:27,106 --> 01:16:29,588 I paid him 120,000 SYP for it 1176 01:16:29,613 --> 01:16:32,839 At that time, 1 USD equaled 450 SYP 1177 01:16:33,638 --> 01:16:37,013 I told my wife, “We can’t stay here any longer” 1178 01:16:37,920 --> 01:16:39,287 We stayed a bit longer 1179 01:16:40,232 --> 01:16:43,999 I said, “We’ll leave at sunrise. There’s heavy security on the organization’s checkpoints” 1180 01:16:44,989 --> 01:16:49,410 I told her, “Prepare my hookah.” I sat smoking while the kids had breakfast 1181 01:16:49,779 --> 01:16:53,412 Then I said, “Go check the street. See if anyone’s there so we can get in the car and flee” 1182 01:16:54,131 --> 01:16:58,504 She saw that our neighbor’s door was open and said, “Abu [name withheld]’s door is open” 1183 01:16:58,529 --> 01:17:03,803 When I went over, I saw he had taken his kids and left. May God guide and forgive him 1184 01:17:03,828 --> 01:17:08,748 That was one of the moments that truly showed how terrified I was of the organization 1185 01:17:09,553 --> 01:17:15,396 There were many other incidents. If I were to talk about them, it would take me three months and I still wouldn’t finish 1186 01:17:19,967 --> 01:17:21,810 One day, the organization took me 1187 01:17:24,459 --> 01:17:29,341 Abu Seif came to me. The first time, he came with Abu Khaled al-Idlibi and other men 1188 01:17:31,904 --> 01:17:32,904 They took me away 1189 01:17:34,162 --> 01:17:37,122 They said, “Come with us to carry out your sentence” 1190 01:17:40,482 --> 01:17:41,482 Of course 1191 01:17:42,732 --> 01:17:45,412 They took me along with six other men 1192 01:17:48,724 --> 01:17:52,326 Among them was a man named Abdul Karim al-Ghaffaf 1193 01:17:52,881 --> 01:17:54,099 He was from the al-Marandi clan 1194 01:17:55,811 --> 01:18:00,654 He was one of my uncles, and his charge was adopting Shia beliefs 1195 01:18:02,256 --> 01:18:04,513 An old man, about 80 years old 1196 01:18:05,114 --> 01:18:08,489 There was also another man from the al-Bu Assaf clan named Yasin al-Yasin 1197 01:18:08,514 --> 01:18:09,514 Anyway 1198 01:18:10,303 --> 01:18:11,740 There were six men, and I was the seventh 1199 01:18:12,459 --> 01:18:17,482 They took me in a car, and I felt that we had left the city 1200 01:18:24,490 --> 01:18:28,763 They made us get out, and there was a cool breeze in the air 1201 01:18:29,146 --> 01:18:31,724 They made us kneel on our knees 1202 01:18:33,108 --> 01:18:34,788 And when they made us kneel 1203 01:18:36,935 --> 01:18:39,810 One of the emirs said, “Remove the cloth blindfold from Talal al-Shuweimi’s eyes” 1204 01:18:41,888 --> 01:18:43,357 They removed the blindfold from my eyes 1205 01:18:45,185 --> 01:18:50,302 Then I looked to my right and left and saw that everyone was lined up on both sides 1206 01:18:51,606 --> 01:18:55,029 They told them, “You did this and that, say the two testimonies” 1207 01:18:57,411 --> 01:19:02,373 So they recited the testimonies, and each one was shot in the head 1208 01:19:03,129 --> 01:19:08,088 I looked around and the place was full of trees—it used to be a Baath Pioneers camp 1209 01:19:08,113 --> 01:19:14,604 When we were kids, we used to go there in summer for school camps during the Assad regime 1210 01:19:16,580 --> 01:19:18,762 One of them said to me, “Talal al-Shuweimi” 1211 01:19:22,293 --> 01:19:23,493 What do you want? 1212 01:19:24,105 --> 01:19:27,855 I said, I don’t want anything. You brought me here and sentenced me to execution 1213 01:19:30,785 --> 01:19:31,824 He said to me 1214 01:19:34,011 --> 01:19:37,499 They removed the cloth blindfold from my eyes so I could see around me 1215 01:19:39,043 --> 01:19:45,324 Among them were well-known people—some of the senior figures in the ISIS state 1216 01:19:45,871 --> 01:19:51,605 High-ranking figures who are still alive today 1217 01:19:56,699 --> 01:19:57,700 He said to me 1218 01:19:58,254 --> 01:20:00,518 Now we’ll carry out the sentence and get rid of you 1219 01:20:00,543 --> 01:20:01,964 Then another masked man came 1220 01:20:04,824 --> 01:20:05,964 And said to me 1221 01:20:08,800 --> 01:20:10,113 What is your last wish? 1222 01:20:15,395 --> 01:20:16,395 At that moment 1223 01:20:47,027 --> 01:20:48,932 I told him, to speak with my children 1224 01:20:51,699 --> 01:20:53,627 He placed the pistol on my head 1225 01:21:02,386 --> 01:21:04,683 He said, “Say the two testimonies,” so I did 1226 01:21:07,596 --> 01:21:08,596 Then he struck me 1227 01:21:09,143 --> 01:21:13,511 As if he hit me in the head, but he fired the shot beside my ear 1228 01:21:16,548 --> 01:21:20,298 When he fired beside my ear, out of terror and horror 1229 01:21:22,306 --> 01:21:24,818 My hands were tied behind my back, and I fell to the ground 1230 01:21:25,517 --> 01:21:28,197 From the terror of it—it was like an American movie 1231 01:21:28,759 --> 01:21:29,853 I mean, something 1232 01:21:30,308 --> 01:21:34,884 Something indescribable, something even the Jews wouldn’t envy you for 1233 01:21:35,447 --> 01:21:42,508 Nor the Christians, nor Israel, nor even black devils would wish to see you in such a position 1234 01:21:42,533 --> 01:21:44,204 They wouldn’t even gloat over you 1235 01:21:49,650 --> 01:21:55,728 The last time I was imprisoned—as I said earlier—they transferred me from one prison to another 1236 01:21:56,590 --> 01:21:58,204 To a prison hidden in a corner 1237 01:21:58,759 --> 01:22:02,628 Sadly, that prison was across from my mother’s house 1238 01:22:03,392 --> 01:22:05,308 My mother’s name is Zahia 1239 01:22:05,712 --> 01:22:08,742 And one of the emirs, named Muhammad al-Abadi 1240 01:22:08,767 --> 01:22:11,907 Used to tell me, “Zahia’s son, I saw Zahia walking in the garden” 1241 01:22:11,932 --> 01:22:14,896 We were on the second floor, and he said, “I saw your mother” 1242 01:22:15,587 --> 01:22:17,095 The man was joking with me 1243 01:22:18,236 --> 01:22:22,017 We escaped from the prison during the days of the Euphrates Dam collapse in Raqqa 1244 01:22:22,931 --> 01:22:26,876 There were several of us, and that same man was with us 1245 01:22:27,572 --> 01:22:29,036 His name was Abu Muhammad al-Abadi 1246 01:22:29,490 --> 01:22:31,490 May God bless and reward him 1247 01:22:32,157 --> 01:22:34,095 We made a hole in the prison wall 1248 01:22:34,120 --> 01:22:41,715 He escaped with us, helped us, and watched the road. There were seven of us, and a car was waiting 1249 01:22:42,613 --> 01:22:44,717 We escaped by car, the seven of us 1250 01:22:50,941 --> 01:22:53,838 As for me, there’s a saying: they asked the nail, “Why did you go into the wall?” 1251 01:22:53,863 --> 01:22:57,496 He answered, “From how much they hit my head” 1252 01:22:57,521 --> 01:23:03,011 I didn’t sell cigarettes by choice, but I was an employee 1253 01:23:03,863 --> 01:23:06,980 My salary was 12,000 Syrian Lira, working in the Water Authority 1254 01:23:07,597 --> 01:23:13,102 After I started working, Air Force Intelligence raided my house and detained my brother, taking him to Sednaya Prison 1255 01:23:15,261 --> 01:23:19,465 When they raided my place and I fled, I had 10 children 1256 01:23:20,746 --> 01:23:22,624 They needed food and bread 1257 01:23:22,785 --> 01:23:27,613 I bought a taxi without papers and drove it, but the income wasn’t enough 1258 01:23:27,925 --> 01:23:31,558 And cigarette trade wasn’t punishable by execution or anything like that 1259 01:23:31,583 --> 01:23:37,002 But the organization imposed execution on us, even though it wasn’t for cigarette trade 1260 01:23:37,080 --> 01:23:39,150 Their judgments became vindictive 1261 01:23:39,307 --> 01:23:44,791 They invented charges—collaboration, cigarettes, ammunition—just to sentence us to execution 1262 01:23:44,854 --> 01:23:50,330 I was forced into cigarette trade. I have children and pay rent for two houses 1263 01:23:50,642 --> 01:23:55,794 Every day I’d buy bread for 2,000 or 3,000 Syrian Lira, and there was no other work 1264 01:23:55,939 --> 01:23:59,406 With the organization, either you join them or remain jobless 1265 01:23:59,689 --> 01:24:01,728 So how could I feed my children? 1266 01:24:01,955 --> 01:24:06,517 Should I trade cigarettes to earn a living and feed them, or let them starve to death? 1267 01:24:10,806 --> 01:24:13,019 Prison had a huge impact on me 1268 01:24:14,580 --> 01:24:16,198 When I first escaped from prison 1269 01:24:16,582 --> 01:24:17,916 I started crying 1270 01:24:18,885 --> 01:24:25,720 Tears of joy, not sadness 1271 01:24:25,792 --> 01:24:28,119 I began kissing the ground 1272 01:24:28,572 --> 01:24:34,517 I looked up to God Almighty, crying and shouting, breathing in the air 1273 01:24:35,158 --> 01:24:38,775 So many things happened to me 1274 01:24:38,800 --> 01:24:42,217 Prison affected me deeply—like forgetfulness, for example 1275 01:24:42,689 --> 01:24:45,213 It left me with memory loss 1276 01:24:46,345 --> 01:24:50,970 Tragic events that scarred me 1277 01:24:51,291 --> 01:24:54,892 In my life, I never held hatred toward anyone 1278 01:24:55,306 --> 01:24:57,798 But they made my heart hard 1279 01:24:57,939 --> 01:25:03,025 They killed the mercy inside me as a human being belonging to humanity 1280 01:25:03,556 --> 01:25:09,101 They ignored so many rights—human rights, and my rights as a Muslim 1281 01:25:09,705 --> 01:25:14,063 As a father and provider for a family, for example 1282 01:25:14,142 --> 01:25:16,189 They stripped the mercy from within me 1283 01:25:16,666 --> 01:25:18,508 There are still many things inside me 1284 01:25:18,533 --> 01:25:25,817 ISIS affected me deeply, and I still suffer from what’s called forgetfulness 1285 01:25:26,220 --> 01:25:30,838 On top of that, the greatest hardship remains—that only God provides and sustains us 1286 01:25:30,970 --> 01:25:33,611 God Almighty is the Provider 1287 01:25:34,556 --> 01:25:37,547 For me, ISIS destroyed my life 1288 01:25:37,891 --> 01:25:40,806 Why am I still struggling today to buy bread? 1289 01:25:42,041 --> 01:25:46,635 Why am I looking for a job as a taxi driver for daily pay? 1290 01:25:49,275 --> 01:25:50,275 What’s the reason? 1291 01:25:52,751 --> 01:25:54,063 Because of an ignorant man 1292 01:25:55,588 --> 01:25:57,088 Because of an infidel 1293 01:25:57,861 --> 01:25:59,908 Who should be in prison for two or three years 1294 01:26:00,416 --> 01:26:03,127 God willing, may the Almighty take from my life 1295 01:26:04,697 --> 01:26:05,916 And give it to his 1296 01:26:07,431 --> 01:26:11,986 Just so I live long enough until he gets out of prison, to see him even for one hour 1297 01:26:13,049 --> 01:26:14,720 To settle my score with him 1298 01:26:15,306 --> 01:26:18,344 An eye for an eye, a tooth for a tooth, and the aggressor is the unjust one 1299 01:26:18,486 --> 01:26:20,690 Everyone dies once 1300 01:26:20,970 --> 01:26:26,862 Better that than dying every hour before your children 1301 01:26:54,252 --> 01:26:57,439 I ask God that he come out of prison, God willing 1302 01:26:59,275 --> 01:27:01,817 And may God keep me alive for you Abu Seif 1303 01:27:02,174 --> 01:27:03,174 God willing 1304 01:27:04,955 --> 01:27:07,791 And I ask that God not let me live if He lets you live 1305 01:27:09,056 --> 01:27:12,116 May God not have mercy on me if I spare you Abu Seif 1306 01:27:12,984 --> 01:27:14,010 If I knew 1307 01:27:14,970 --> 01:27:17,291 that all the world's intelligence services protect you 1308 01:27:18,072 --> 01:27:24,492 The Coalition, Israel, Bashar al-Assad, and your Baghdadi, even if all of them protect you 1309 01:27:24,517 --> 01:27:27,398 If I knew how to become a bomb to blow you up, I would definitely do it
